sourceOverview.notes: Fast open model inference. No audio.

activeModelsSummary.llm: Deploy your own models/endpoints [custom] — Now positioned as NVIDIA DGX Cloud Lepton

audit.priceRangeSummary: Infrastructure-style pricing, not a simple fixed model catalog. Current public positioning is more compute/platform than turnkey model brokerage.
audit.limitsSummary: No stable public hosted model catalog similar to Together/Replicate was clearly visible from current official material.
audit.regionSummary: Runs where your data lives / multi-cloud GPU network. Region is customer-selected subject to provider availability.
audit.freeTierSummary: No simple permanent free tier found.
audit.appIntegrationNotes: This is better treated as infrastructure than as a drop-in 'provider + model list' option in a speech app chooser.

supplementalResearch.title: 35. Lepton AI (US) — ⚠️ ACQUIRED
supplementalResearch.markdown:
### 35. Lepton AI (US) — ⚠️ ACQUIRED

**Status:** Acquired by NVIDIA (March/April 2025). Now NVIDIA DGX Cloud Lepton — a GPU compute marketplace, not standalone inference. **Effectively deprecated** for BYOK integration.
